description: Template variables used by the setup wizard to personalize toolkit files. Each variable has a prompt shown to the user during setup, a default value (null = required input), and a list of files where the variable appears. IMPORTANT: used_in must ONLY reference template files (life/templates/, core/templates/), NEVER skill files or hooks. Skills and hooks read personalized values from ~/.claude/toolkit-state/config.json at runtime. This separation ensures /contribute never leaks personal data — skill files stay identical to upstream.

USER_NAME.description: User's display name — used in encyclopedia headers and compiled documents

DRIVE_ROOT.description: Google Drive base path for toolkit data (rclone remote prefix). Written to config.json; read by hooks at runtime.
DRIVE_ROOT.prompt: Where should Claude store files on your Google Drive? ('Root' just means a top-level folder — one of the first folders you see when you open Drive, not inside any other folder.)

TODOIST_PROJECT.description: Todoist project name for inbox processing. Written to config.json; read by hooks at runtime.
TODOIST_PROJECT.prompt: What Todoist project should Claude use as your inbox?

JOURNAL_DIR.description: Local directory path for journal entries. Written to config.json; read by skills at runtime.
JOURNAL_DIR.prompt: What folder name should Claude use for your journal? This creates a folder inside Claude's config directory — you don't need to create it yourself.

ENCYCLOPEDIA_DIR.description: Local cache directory for encyclopedia modular source files. Written to config.json; read by skills at runtime.
ENCYCLOPEDIA_DIR.prompt: What folder name should Claude use for your encyclopedia files? Same deal — it's created automatically inside Claude's config directory.

PERSONAL_SYNC_BACKEND.description: Where to back up personal data (memory, CLAUDE.md, config). Options: 'drive' (Google Drive via rclone), 'github' (private GitHub repo), 'none' (skip). Written to config.json; read by sync.sh hook at runtime.
PERSONAL_SYNC_BACKEND.prompt:
Your toolkit improvements sync to the public DestinClaude repo — that's just skills, hooks, and commands, nothing personal. But your memory, preferences, and personal config need a private home. Where should Claude back those up?

1. Google Drive (recommended if you set up Drive earlier)
2. Private GitHub repo
3. Skip for now

PERSONAL_SYNC_REPO.description: Private GitHub repo URL for personal data backup. Only used when PERSONAL_SYNC_BACKEND is 'github'. Written to config.json; read by sync.sh hook at runtime.
PERSONAL_SYNC_REPO.prompt: What's the URL of your private GitHub repo for personal data? (I can create one for you if you don't have one yet.)
